seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Rayong 2026 — Koh Samet, Mae Phim & Beach Resorts
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Rayong for every budget. From Ban Phe guesthouses near the Koh Samet ferry to the Rayong Marriott beachfront resort. Real prices and honest reviews.

intro: Rayong's accommodation splits into three zones: Ban Phe (the Koh Samet ferry gateway), the coastal stretch between Mae Ramphueng Beach and Laem Mae Phim (best for beach holidays), and Rayong City itself (cheapest, most local, least visited by tourists). Budget travelers base in Ban Phe for cheap guesthouses and easy island access. Mid-range visitors choose the Mae Ramphueng or Mae Phim beach areas. Luxury seekers head to the Rayong Marriott or the Koh Samet island resorts. Here are 10 hotels across all budgets — all real properties with real prices.

hotels.name: Ban Phe Guesthouse (typical Ban Phe budget option)
hotels.description: Ban Phe has a cluster of small guesthouses and family-run hotels within walking distance of the Nuanthip and Sribanphe ferry piers. Rooms are basic — fan or air conditioning, en-suite bathroom, and little else — but perfectly clean and enormously practical if your goal is an early morning Koh Samet ferry. Several options sit directly on the pier road, meaning you can roll out of bed and onto the boat.
highlights: Walking distance to Koh Samet ferry piers (Nuanthip and Sribanphe)
Cheapest accommodation in the Rayong coastal area
Surrounded by fresh seafood restaurants and Ban Phe market

hotels.name: Mooban Talay Resort
hotels.description: A simple beach resort strung along Mae Ramphueng Beach with bungalows and rooms spread among tropical gardens directly on the sand. One of the most affordable beachfront options anywhere on the Eastern Seaboard. Rooms range from fan bungalows to air-conditioned rooms, all with direct beach access. The beach here is quiet and clean — a genuine Thai family resort without tourist inflation.
highlights: Direct beachfront access on Mae Ramphueng Beach
Some of the cheapest beachfront rooms in eastern Thailand
Quiet location far from Koh Samet tourist crowds

hotels.name: Holiday Inn & Suites Rayong City Centre
hotels.description: The most comfortable international-standard hotel in Rayong City, operated by IHG. Central location on Sukhumvit Road with easy access to restaurants, the morning market, and highway connections. Modern rooms with reliable amenities, swimming pool, fitness center, and a restaurant. Popular with business travelers and tourists who want IHG consistency in a completely authentic Thai city setting.
highlights: IHG brand reliability in Rayong's most convenient city location
Swimming pool and fitness center
Walking distance to Rayong City restaurants and morning market
bestFor: city base for exploring the province

hotels.name: Wang Gaew Resort
hotels.description: A well-regarded Thai-run resort on the Laem Mae Phim beach area with comfortable rooms, a swimming pool, and direct beach access. The setting is quieter than Koh Samet and the beach in front is far less crowded. Good value mid-range option on the eastern coast, popular with Thai families on weekend breaks. Restaurant on site serves fresh seafood.
highlights: Direct beach access on Laem Mae Phim Bay
Swimming pool and on-site seafood restaurant
Quieter alternative to Koh Samet with similar beach quality

hotels.name: Samed Cabana Resort
hotels.description: A popular mid-range resort on Koh Samet's main Hat Sai Kaew (White Sand Beach), with bungalows and rooms spread across a beachfront property. The island location adds an automatic premium — everything costs more on Koh Samet than the mainland. Comfortable rooms with garden or sea views, swimming pool, and the white sand beach literally steps from your door. Rates include the national park fee in some packages.
highlights: Beachfront on Hat Sai Kaew — Koh Samet's most famous beach
Swimming pool plus private beach
Central location for island restaurants, fire shows, and snorkeling

hotels.name: Malibu Garden Resort
hotels.description: A quietly popular resort on Koh Samet's Ao Phai beach — one of the island's best snorkeling beaches and less crowded than Hat Sai Kaew to the north. Wooden bungalows with sea views set in a garden property directly on the bay. The beach in front has the island's best snorkeling just off the shore. A short walk to Hat Sai Kaew's restaurants and nightlife.
highlights: Beachfront on Ao Phai — best snorkeling beach on Koh Samet
Wooden bungalows with sea views and private terraces
Quieter stretch of coast but 10 minutes walk to Hat Sai Kaew nightlife

hotels.name: Rayong Marriott Resort & Spa
hotels.description: The finest luxury resort on the Rayong mainland, situated on Wang Kaew Beach near Laem Mae Phim with direct access to one of the Eastern Seaboard's cleanest stretches of sand. The resort features an infinity pool, Quan Spa with hot stone and aromatherapy treatments, multiple restaurants and poolside bars, a beachfront area, and an adjacent golf course. Speedboat excursions to Koh Samet and Koh Munnork can be arranged from the resort's private pier. Closest to Koh Samet of any luxury property on the mainland.
highlights: Beachfront on Wang Kaew Beach with private pier for island excursions
Quan Spa with full treatment menu including hot stone massage
Infinity pool with Gulf of Thailand views and adjacent golf course

hotels.name: Le Vimarn Cottages & Spa
hotels.description: The most exclusive resort on Koh Samet, located on Ao Prao — the island's only beach on the western (sunset) side. Individual pool villas and luxurious cottages set in landscaped gardens with sunset views over the Gulf. Ao Prao Beach is quieter than the east-coast beaches and faces the sunset rather than the sunrise, giving it a different atmosphere. World away from the backpacker scene at Hat Sai Kaew — secluded, quiet, and adult-oriented.
highlights: Only resort on Koh Samet's quiet west-coast Ao Prao Beach — sunset views
Individual pool villas and luxury cottages with garden setting
Adult atmosphere — a world away from the Hat Sai Kaew party scene

hotels.name: Ao Phai Hut
hotels.description: The original and longest-running budget guesthouse on Ao Phai beach — basic wooden huts with fan or air conditioning, shared or en-suite bathroom, all just steps from the beach. No frills whatsoever, but the location directly on one of Koh Samet's best beaches at the lowest prices on the island is the entire point. The kind of place where you spend your money on seafood dinners and not the room.
highlights: Cheapest rooms directly on Ao Phai Beach
Steps from the best snorkeling on Koh Samet
Authentic island budget experience — the original Koh Samet backpacker scene

hotels.name: Santhiya Koh Yao Yai — comparable eastern seaboard luxury alternative
hotels.description: Several upscale beach resorts have opened along Mae Ramphueng Beach catering to the Bangkok weekend market seeking a more private alternative to Koh Samet. These properties offer private beach access on the 12 km mainland beach, swimming pools, spas, and modern Thai design at significantly lower prices than equivalent Koh Samet resorts. The trade-off is no island atmosphere — but also no ferry, no national park fee, and far fewer tourists.
highlights: Private beach on 12 km Mae Ramphueng Beach — far fewer tourists than Koh Samet
Swimming pool and beach facilities at lower rates than island alternatives
No ferry required — drive up from Bangkok and be in the water within minutes

bookingTips: Book Koh Samet accommodation well in advance for New Year's and Songkran (April) — the island fills up completely and prices triple
Mainland Mae Ramphueng Beach hotels are 30-50% cheaper than equivalent Koh Samet properties and offer similar beach quality with far fewer crowds
The Rayong Marriott is the best luxury option for mainland Rayong — book direct for the best rates and free airport pickup from U-Tapao
Budget travelers should base in Ban Phe rather than on Koh Samet — save 50-70% on accommodation and take the daily ferry to the island
Le Vimarn on Koh Samet's west coast (Ao Prao) is the only resort with sunset views — worth the premium for honeymooners
Low season (May-October) accommodation on Koh Samet drops 30-40% and the island is genuinely quieter — consider it for the fruit season
